key_lessons: Layering validation through delegation (estimate_tensor_count -> tensor_size) keeps code DRY but should be documented explicitly in docstrings so future readers understand which layer owns shape validation.
100% coverage on a small, stateless, well-decomposed module is achievable without extra effort — confirms the plan's design goal was followed.
DType.__init__ pattern is a clean idiom for attaching multiple metadata fields to enum members without sacrificing readability.
